title: PS2 Shader
description: This Shaderpack adds CRT TV like PS2 gameplay
body:
# PS2 Shader

A CRT TV-inspired shader that brings the look of PS2-era gaming straight into Minecraft. Retro fog, film-like color grading, and old-school visual filters — all running at full speed on low-end hardware.

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe327ae71b3c14710db4e597ed566053ecdd764e.png)

**Features:**
- CRT fog with adjustable render distance
- Brightness, contrast, and saturation controls
- Fully customizable via Iris shader menu
- Runs on potato PCs

**Requires Iris Shaders.**
